component.name: Cubi Frontend
component.summary: Multiplayer emulator frontend with gamepad navigation

description.p: Cubi Frontend is a fast, gamepad-navigable launcher for retro and modern emulators. Browse and launch games across 70+ systems with scraped metadata, box art, and CRT-style themes.

ul.li: Native gamepad navigation tuned for the Steam Deck and arcade cabinets
Auto-detects EmuDeck and other common emulator installations
Supports multiple data roots — internal storage, USB drives, NAS
Metadata scrapers for ScreenScraper, IGDB, Steam, and more

description.p: Full system logo coverage — every supported system now ships with a white SVG logo.
